mapper.select:
SELECT user_id userId, cid, multi_company multiCompany, id, task_source taskSource, process_id processId, task_name taskName, process_name processName, table_no tableNo, initiator_name initiatorName, start_time startTime, create_time createTime, reject, open_url openUrl FROM wfm_task_complete
task_name like concat(concat('%',#{taskName}),'%')
process_name like concat(concat('%',#{processName}),'%')
table_no like concat(concat('%',#{formNo}),'%')
initiator_name like concat(concat('%',#{initiator}),'%')
AND user_id = #{queryContract.userId} AND start_time >= #{queryContract.startFrom} AND start_time <= #{queryContract.startTo} AND create_time >= #{queryContract.completeFrom} AND create_time <= #{queryContract.completeTo}
order by create_time desc limit #{begin}, #{end}
